description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier - discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Contract authority for the ORGANVM estate: 34 canonical JSON Schemas, examples, validator CLI, and tests that can become the shared assurance, onboarding, documentation, and machine-readable schema catalog layer for every organ.
ranked.first_task: Generate a checked-in schema catalog and reference page from `schemas/*.json` plus `examples/*`, then add a `--check-catalog` validation gate so docs, examples, and CLI schema detection cannot drift from the canonical contract set.
